Amended Notice Of Mo. & Mo. For Orders Compelling Attendance At Deposition, Compelling Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Futher Special Interrogatories, Compelling Answers & Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Conservator Bertha Joung's Motion For Orders (1) Compelling Attendance At Deposition; (2) Compelling Answers To Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories; (3) Compelling Answers and Production of Documents In Response To Petitioner's First Request For Production of Documents; and (4) For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Respondent Camelia Kao's failure to respond and failure to appear at her noticed deposition were misuses of the discovery process. Respondent Camelia Kao is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order and is ordered to appear at her deposition to be noticed by Petitioner. This order does not determine whether the privilege against self-incrimination has been waived or whether it is properly asserted. Sanctions are awarded against Respondent Camelia Kao in the amount of $1,393.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/EAHEWLETT)
